environment.description: Whether business endpoints require API key or bearer-token auth.
environment.name: API_KEY_AUTH_ENABLED

environment.description: Header name accepted for API key authentication.
environment.name: API_KEY_HEADER

environment.description: Comma-separated SHA-256 API key hashes.
environment.name: API_KEY_SHA256S

environment.description: Whether redacted RAG audit logging is enabled.
environment.name: AUDIT_LOG_ENABLED

environment.description: Fallback sandbox ID when callers do not send X-Sandbox-ID.
environment.name: DEFAULT_SANDBOX_ID

environment.description: Default number of retrieval results.
environment.name: DEFAULT_TOP_K

environment.description: Maximum context characters returned to callers.
environment.name: MAX_CONTEXT_CHARS

environment.description: Maximum accepted query length in characters.
environment.name: MAX_QUERY_CHARS

environment.description: Maximum allowed retrieval result count.
environment.name: MAX_TOP_K

environment.description: OTLP/HTTP endpoint for span export when tracing is enabled.
environment.name: OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT

environment.description: Service name attribute attached to exported spans.
environment.name: OTEL_SERVICE_NAME

environment.description: Whether OpenTelemetry span export is enabled.
environment.name: OTEL_TRACING_ENABLED

environment.description: Whether knowledge documents are bootstrapped into Qdrant on first query.
environment.name: QDRANT_BOOTSTRAP_FROM_KNOWLEDGE

environment.description: Qdrant collection name.
environment.name: QDRANT_COLLECTION

environment.description: Logical Qdrant collection version used for ingestion payloads and retrieval filters.
environment.name: QDRANT_COLLECTION_VERSION

environment.description: Qdrant request timeout in seconds.
environment.name: QDRANT_TIMEOUT_SECONDS

environment.description: Qdrant base URL when vector retrieval is enabled.
environment.name: QDRANT_URL

environment.description: Vector dimension count expected by Qdrant.
environment.name: QDRANT_VECTOR_DIMENSIONS

environment.description: Directory containing mounted knowledge documents.
environment.name: RAG_DOCUMENT_DIR

environment.description: OpenAI-compatible embedding endpoint base URL.
environment.name: RAG_EMBEDDING_BASE_URL

environment.description: Embedding model identifier sent to the provider.
environment.name: RAG_EMBEDDING_MODEL

environment.description: Embedding provider for Qdrant vectors.
environment.name: RAG_EMBEDDING_PROVIDER

environment.description: Expected JWT audience when set.
environment.name: RAG_JWT_AUDIENCE

environment.description: JWKS cache TTL in seconds.
environment.name: RAG_JWT_CACHE_SECONDS

environment.description: Whether the RAG service verifies its own audience-bound bearer token and derives the tenant from the verified claim (overriding X-Sandbox-ID). Off by default: header-trust as before.
environment.name: RAG_JWT_ENABLED

environment.description: Expected JWT issuer when set.
environment.name: RAG_JWT_ISSUER

environment.description: JWKS URL used to fetch signing keys when JWT verification is enabled.
environment.name: RAG_JWT_JWKS_URL

environment.description: JWKS fetch timeout in seconds (capped at 10).
environment.name: RAG_JWT_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS

environment.description: Whether a valid JWT is mandatory on business endpoints (fail closed: no/invalid token -> 401).
environment.name: RAG_JWT_REQUIRED

environment.description: Verified JWT claim the tenant/sandbox id is derived from; a header that contradicts it is rejected (403), a missing/empty claim is rejected.
environment.name: RAG_JWT_TENANT_CLAIM

environment.description: Base URL of the /rerank endpoint when the reranker provider is openai-compatible.
environment.name: RAG_RERANKER_BASE_URL

environment.description: Reranker model identifier sent to the /rerank endpoint.
environment.name: RAG_RERANKER_MODEL

environment.description: Optional cross-encoder reranker second stage.
environment.name: RAG_RERANKER_PROVIDER

environment.description: Reranker request timeout in seconds.
environment.name: RAG_RERANKER_TIMEOUT_SECONDS

environment.description: Access-scope retrieval to documents whose classification is in this list; empty returns all.
environment.name: RAG_RETRIEVAL_ALLOWED_CLASSIFICATIONS

environment.description: Retrieval backend used by the service.
environment.name: RAG_RETRIEVAL_BACKEND

environment.description: Dense candidates over-fetched (x topK) before the hybrid lexical rerank.
environment.name: RAG_RETRIEVAL_CANDIDATE_MULTIPLIER

environment.description: Weight (0..1) of lexical query-term overlap blended with the dense score.
environment.name: RAG_RETRIEVAL_LEXICAL_WEIGHT

environment.description: Qdrant payload field (stamped at ingest) matched against the caller's tenant id.
environment.name: RAG_RETRIEVAL_TENANT_FIELD

environment.description: Whether retrieval is scoped to the caller's tenant (X-Sandbox-ID) via the tenant field. Enabled by default (app default true) and enforced on both the Qdrant and lexical backends; fails closed when the tenant is missing or not explicitly asserted. The bundled local lexical profile sets the chart value false (single-tenant). The header is client-asserted under the shared API key, so this is tenant scoping for trusted callers (e.g. gateway-fronted traffic with JWT tenant binding), not an identity control against a caller that lies about its tenant.
environment.name: RAG_RETRIEVAL_TENANT_ISOLATION_ENABLED

environment.description: Optional path to a platform.ai/v1alpha1 RagSourceManifest YAML file.
environment.name: RAG_SOURCE_MANIFEST
